# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Operations
- [ ] Other

## Scope

List the main files, products, or systems affected.

## Verification

Describe tests, review steps, screenshots, commands, or documentation checks performed.

## Documentation

- [ ] Relevant documentation is updated.
- [ ] Product status is accurate.
- [ ] Roadmap, ADR, decision, or standard is updated if needed.

## Risk Review

- [ ] No secrets or private data are included.
- [ ] Security impact is considered.
- [ ] Deployment or rollback notes are included if applicable.
- [ ] Customer or operational impact is described if applicable.

## Notes For Reviewers

Add context, open questions, or decisions needed.
